title: post api v1 users login with valid credentials
description: Test the login endpoint with valid employee credentials to ensure it returns a 200 status and a valid authentication token.

title: post api v1 users login with invalid credentials
description: Test the login endpoint with invalid credentials to verify it returns a 400 status with an 'Invalid credentials' error message.

title: post api v1 users logout with valid token
description: Test the logout endpoint with a valid token in the Authorization header to ensure it invalidates the token and returns a 200 status with a success message.

title: post api v1 users logout without authorization header
description: Test the logout endpoint without providing an Authorization header to verify it returns a 401 status indicating authentication credentials were not provided.

title: post api v1 inventory categories create category
description: Test creating a new category with valid data and a valid token to ensure it returns a 201 status and the created category object.

title: post api v1 inventory products create product with valid data
description: Test creating a new product with all required fields and a valid token to verify it returns a 201 status and the created product object.

title: post api v1 users customers create customer with valid data
description: Test creating a new customer with valid data and a valid token to ensure it returns a 201 status and the created customer object.

title: post api v1 sales create sale with sufficient stock
description: Test creating a new sale with items that have sufficient stock to verify it returns a 201 status and the created sale object with stock decremented atomically.

title: post api v1 sales create sale with insufficient stock
description: Test creating a new sale where one or more items exceed available stock to ensure it returns a 409 status with an 'Insufficient stock' error.

title: patch api v1 sales cancel sale
description: Test cancelling an existing sale by sending a PATCH request with action 'cancel' to verify it returns a 200 status, updates the sale state to CANCELLED, and restores product stock.
